1177.name: Black Hole
1177.description: This planet has been turned into a black hole.

1186.name: Light Gloom
1186.description: This world is lightly obscured by a gloom cloud.

1187.name: Gloom
1187.description: A gloom cloud enveloped this world.

1188.name: Dense Gloom
1188.description: A thick gloom cloud obscures this world from view.

1190.name: Unreachable
1190.description: Our sensors can no longer monitor this planet.

1192.name: ENEMY SURGE: IMPALER
1192.description: Impaler presence has been increased significantly.

1193.name: Gloom Border
1193.description: This world is on the border of the interstellar wall of gloom.

1194.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: ORBITAL NAPALM BARRAGE
1194.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Orbital Napalm Barrage Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1195.name: DSS Construction Site- Phase 1
1195.description: Construction has began on the Democracy Space Station.  The local populace is honored to host thousands of construction crews for this historic event.

1196.name: DSS Logistics Hub
1196.description: Parts for the Democracy Space Station are prefabricated all over the Galaxy, then shipped here to await assembly.

1197.name: XENOENTOMOLOGY CENTER
1197.description: Those who study Terminid behavior, ecology and E-710 potential gather here for cross-disciplinary research.

1198.name: Deep Mantle Forge Complex
1198.description: The smelters and refineries on this planet turn crude materials into usable hardware.

1199.name: DSS Construction Site- Phase 2
1199.description: Democracy Space Station construction is well underway. The local economy is flourishing as the planetâ€™s populace has centupled, and all the Galaxy can feel their democratic fervor.

1200.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: TESLA TOWER
1200.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Tesla Tower Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1202.name: THE JET BRIGADE (Enemies)
1202.description: The Automatons have deployed a new series of specialized models on this planet. These upgraded bots utilize stolen Jump Pack technology, heartlessly pillaged from the bodies of fallen Helldivers and reverse-engineered into something nearly unrecognizeable.

1203.name: THE JET BRIGADE
1203.description: The Automatons have deployed a new series of specialized models on this planet. These upgraded bots utilize stolen Jump Pack technology, heartlessly pillaged from the bodies of fallen Helldivers and reverse-engineered into something nearly unrecognizeable.

1204.name: LIBERTY DAY
1204.description: This planet is celebrating Liberty Day.

1205.name: DSS CONSTRUCTION SITE - PHASE 3
1205.description: Construction of the Democracy Space Station is nearing completion. This project, which has employed millions, will soon take its place among the greatest achievements of Democracy.

1206.name: TERMINID RESEARCH PRESERVE
1206.description: Terminids are held safely within massive compounts on this planet for study and E-710 extraction.

1207.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: HMG EMPLACEMENT
1207.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the HMG Emplacement Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1209.name: EAGLE STORM (Strafing Runs)
1209.description: The DSS deploys Eagle Strafing Runs during missions.

1210.name: BOOSTER PERMIT: HELLPOD SPACE OPTIMISATION
1210.description: Hellpod Space Optimisation Booster is automatically active for all missions.

1212.name: EAGLE STORM (Marker)
1212.description: Map marker for the Eagle Storm effect.

1213.name: ORBITAL BLOCKADE (Marker)
1213.description: Map marker for the Orbital Blockade effect.

1214.name: BOMBARDMENT LIBERATION BOOST
1214.description: Progress in Liberation Campaigns is accelerated by 150%.

1215.name: TACTICAL ACTION: ORBITAL BLOCKADE
1215.description: Defense Campaigns cannot originate from this planet.

1216.name: EAGLE STORM (Blocker)
1216.description: Enemy progress in Defense Campaigns is slowed.

1217.name: DEMOCRACY SPACE STATION
1217.description: A Helldiver-operated weapon of mass liberation. Paid for with the blood of soldiers and the credits of taxpayers, this technological marvel is Democracy made manifest.

1222.name: REGEN OVERRIDE
1222.description: Regen Rate is set to a fixed 10000 per hour.

1223.name: BOOSTER PERMIT: INCREASED REINFORCEMENT BUDGET
1223.description: Increased Reinforcement Budget Booster is automatically active for all missions.

1224.name: BOOSTER PERMIT: INCREASED REINFORCEMENT BUDGET
1224.description: Increased Reinforcement Budget Booster is automatically active for all missions.

1226.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: SPEAR
1226.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Spear Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1227.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: MACHINE GUN
1227.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Machine Gun Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1228.name: MERIDIAN BLACK HOLE (Stable)
1228.description: The prosperous Meridia was corrupted into a Terminid Supercolony, necessitating its destruction using the mysterious Dark Fluid.  This galactic scar is all that remains.

1229.name: MERIDIAN BLACK HOLE (Unstable)
1229.description: The prosperous Meridia was corrupted into a Terminid Supercolony, necessitating its destruction using the mysterious Dark Fluid.  This galactic scar is all that remains.

1230.name: MERIDIAN BLACK HOLE (Restricted)
1230.description: The prosperous Meridia was corrupted into a Terminid Supercolony, necessitating its destruction using the mysterious Dark Fluid. This galactic scar is all that remains. Advisory: volatile spacetime fluctuations currently prohibit FTL travel to the Meridian Black Hole.

1231.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: GAS MINES
1231.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Gas Mines Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1232.name: FACTORY HUB
1232.description: The hard workers on this planet produce goods vital to the war effort, as well as to the prosperity of Super Earth.

1233.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: W.A.S.P. LAUNCHER
1233.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the W.A.S.P. Launcher Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1234.name: CENTER OF SCIENCE
1234.description: On this planet, the Ministry of Science's best and brightest work on their next breakthrough.

1235.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: ANTI-TANK MINES
1235.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Anti-tank Mines Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1236.name: CENTER FOR CIVILIAN SURVEILLANCE AND SAFETY
1236.description: The Ministry of Truth analyzes citizens' activity, speech, data, DNA, RNA, and neural topology here.

1237.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: ORBITAL 380MM HE BARRAGE
1237.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Orbital 380mm HE Barrage Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1238.name: OPERATIONAL SUPPORT
1238.description: The presence of the DSS near this planet provides a slight boost to Liberation Campaign progress.

1239.name: JET BRIGADE FACTORIES
1239.description: Vertically enhanced Jet Brigade soldiers are produced here.

1240.name: VERGE OF DESTRUCTION
1240.description: This planet is under threat of destruction.

1241.name: FRACTURED PLANET
1241.description: All that remains of a planet torn apart by the Meridian singularity. A solemn reminder of the desolation Tyranny leaves in its wake.

1242.name: MOVING PLANET
1242.description: This planet is moving and is estimated to impact Super Earth.

1243.name: PREDATOR STRAIN (Enemies)
1243.description: A Gloom-enhanced strain of Terminids has been reported on this planet. SEAF patrols have been lured into ambushes, and picked off by unseen assailants. Every ounce of a Helldiver's superior senses will be required to hunt down this dangerous threat.

1244.name: Spore Burst Strain (Enemies)
1244.description: A Gloom-enhanced strain of Terminids has been reported on this planet. They can explode into spores.

1245.name: PREDATOR STRAIN
1245.description: A Gloom-enhanced strain of Terminids has been reported on this planet. SEAF patrols have been lured into ambushes, and picked off by unseen assailants. Every ounce of a Helldiver's superior senses will be required to hunt down this dangerous threat.

1247.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: GAS MINES
1247.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Gas Mines Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1248.name: THE INCINERATION CORPS (Enemies)
1248.description: An Automaton unit equipped with flame throwers and incendiary ammunition is active on this planet. These wanton arsonists will not rest until they have razed all that humankind holds dear.

1249.name: THE INCINERATION CORPS
1249.description: An Automaton unit equipped with flame throwers and incendiary ammunition is active on this planet. These wanton arsonists will not rest until they have razed all that humankind holds dear.

1267.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Orbital Gas Strike Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1268.name: DEEP SPACE DETECTION GRID
1268.description: Scientists without fear of implosion or spaghettification study negative energy here.

1281.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Eagle Smoke Strike Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1282.name: HELLDIVER TRAINING FACILITIES
1282.description: Here, the best of the best go through the rigorous Helldiver training that will earn them their capes.

1283.name: FACTORY STRIDER SURGE
1283.description: Significantly higher Factory Strider numbers have been observed on this planet.

1284.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: RECOILLESS RIFLE
1284.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Recoilless Rifle Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1285.name: IMPALER RAMPAGE
1285.description: Significantly higher Impaler numbers have been observed on this planet.

1286.name: HOPE CONSTRUCTION SITE
1286.description: One of 3 Maximum Security Cities is under construction here.

1287.name: NEW HOPE CITY
1287.description: The flagship Maximum Security City. Impregnable to Tyranny; the future of the Federation.

1288.name: SPORE BURST SCAVENGER RAMPAGE
1288.description: Significantly increased levels of Spore Burst Scavengers have been reported on this planet.

1290.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: UNKNOWN STRATAGEM
1290.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of an Unknown Stratagem Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1291.name: NEW ASPIRATION CITY
1291.description: One of 3 Maximum Security Cities. Impregnable to Tyranny; the future of the Federation.

1292.name: NEW YEARNING CITY
1292.description: One of 3 Maximum Security Cities. Impregnable to Tyranny; the future of the Federation.

1293.name: CHARGER RAMPAGE
1293.description: Significantly increased levels of Chargers have been reported on this planet.

1295.name: TYRANNY PARK 2
1295.description: The extensive Terminid enclosures here allow scientists to study Terminid behavior, and civilians to take pictures with Brood Commanders.

1297.name: HUNTER RAMPAGE
1297.description: Terrestrial scans indicate that Hunter threat density is 800% higher than normal.

1301.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: GATLING SENTRY
1301.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Gatling Sentry Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1302.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: "GUARD DOG" ROVER
1302.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the "Guard Dog" Rover Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1304.name: OUTPOST ALPHA
1304.description: The first manned site established in Gloom-infested space.

1306.name: DRAGONROACHES (Enemies)
1306.description: Terminid Dragonroaches menace the skies of this planet.

1307.name: HIVE LORDS (Enemies)
1307.description: Terminid Hive Lords have been detected on this planet.

1308.name: HIVE LORDS
1308.description: Terminid Hive Lords have been detected on this planet.

1309.name: DRAGONROACHES
1309.description: Terminid Dragonroaches menace the skies of this planet.

1310.name: RUPTURE STRAIN
1310.description: A deadly strain of ground-bursting Terminids is present on this planet.

1311.name: HIVE WORLD
1311.description: This planet has been completely infested by the Terminids, transformed inside and out into a hive of Tyranny. It is a source of Gloom spores.

1328.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: AIRBURST ROCKET LAUNCHER
1328.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Airburst Rocket Launcher Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1329.name: LIBERTY DAY CELEBRATION
1329.description: Super Earth, our home, is the center of Liberty Day Festivities. Together, all citizens can watch on television the annual Defense Parade, the Justice Executions, and of course, the Freedom Fireworks.

1335.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Orbital Walking Barrage Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1342.name: CENTER FOR THE CONFINEMENT OF DISSIDENCE
1342.description: This planet-wide, ultra-high-security facility provides ample space for the secure confinrment of terroritst dissidents until they are fully rehabilitated and re-educated.

1343.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: Eagle Napalm Airstrike
1343.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Eagle Napalm Airstrike Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1348.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the De-Escalator Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1351.name: ARSENAL AUGMENTATION: Portable Hellbomb
1351.description: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Portable Hellbomb Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

1352.name: CONVENTIONAL BLACK HOLE
1352.description: This former planet is now nothing but a normal, stable black hole.

1353.name: DATA CENTER
1353.description: The Automatons store large amounts of encrypted information here.

1354.name: HEAVY ARMOR SURGE
1354.description: Prepare to counter high numbers of heavily armored enemies.

1362.name: AUTOMATON AIR SUPREMACY
1362.description: High-altitude Automaton warships exchange heavy fire with Super Earth aircraft.
